---
title: "Replica Afzal UAE"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
---

## Paper base

Siddiqui and Afzal on UAE sectoral diversification toward a knowledge-based economy

## Replica

- HHI recomputation
- Comparison against published Table 3
- DEA CCR audit

## Extension

- Ecuador HHI by ISIC branches
- Ecuador DEA exercises

## Revista objetivo

- MLAJ
- Latindex: `PENDIENTE_VERIFICAR`

## Regla

No reportar nada que no salga de `outputs/` o `paper/`.
